subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-25 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The circumstances have been thus ordained that I should associate and commune with the disciples. It is a divine decree whose purpose remaineth hidden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسباب اینطور فراهم آمده که مجالس و معاشر حضرات تلامذه باشم.  حکم غیبیه است که معلوم نیست
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @wisdom [hikmat]
